---
title: GitHub formula compatibility extension test
author: Dongyu Zhao
version: 0.1
date: '2026-05-09'
license: '[CC-BY-SA 4.0](http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/)'
...

## GitHub formula compatibility

These examples define the GitHub Docs dollar formula-expression surface
supported by the `formula` extension when `--dollar-formula-delimiters` is
enabled. The HTML wrapper is markdown-core's stable representation; the wrapped
delimiter/body text is the payload handed to LaTeX/KaTeX.

```````````````````````````````` example
Inline $x+y$ end.
.
Document scope=1:1..1:17 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:17 children=3
    ├── Text scope=1:1..1:7 literal="Inline " children=0
    ├── Formula scope=1:8..1:12 mode=embedded literal="x+y" children=0
    └── Text scope=1:13..1:17 literal=" end." children=0
````````````````````````````````

Formula expressions parse as inline content inside table cells.

```````````````````````````````` example table
| expr |
| --- |
| $x+y$ |
.
Document scope=1:1..3:9 children=1
└── Table scope=1:1..3:9 alignments=[none] children=2
    ├── TableRow scope=1:1..1:8 isHeader=true children=1
    │   └── TableCell scope=1:2..1:7 children=1
    │       └── Text scope=1:3..1:6 literal="expr" children=0
    └── TableRow scope=3:1..3:9 isHeader=false children=1
        └── TableCell scope=3:2..3:8 children=1
            └── Formula scope=3:3..3:7 mode=embedded literal="x+y" children=0
````````````````````````````````

GitHub's `$`...`$` form treats the backticks as formula delimiters, not as body
bytes.

```````````````````````````````` example
Inline $`x+y`$ end.
.
Document scope=1:1..1:19 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:19 children=3
    ├── Text scope=1:1..1:7 literal="Inline " children=0
    ├── Formula scope=1:8..1:14 mode=embedded literal="x+y" children=0
    └── Text scope=1:15..1:19 literal=" end." children=0
````````````````````````````````

```````````````````````````````` example
Escaped dollar $`\sqrt{\$4}`$ end.
.
Document scope=1:1..1:34 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:34 children=3
    ├── Text scope=1:1..1:15 literal="Escaped dollar " children=0
    ├── Formula scope=1:16..1:29 mode=embedded literal="\\sqrt{\\$4}" children=0
    └── Text scope=1:30..1:34 literal=" end." children=0
````````````````````````````````

Dollar formula delimiters do not open before whitespace.

```````````````````````````````` example
Inline $ x$ end.
.
Document scope=1:1..1:16 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:16 children=1
    └── Text scope=1:1..1:16 literal="Inline $ x$ end." children=0
````````````````````````````````

Dollar formula delimiters do not close after whitespace.

```````````````````````````````` example
Inline $x $ end.
.
Document scope=1:1..1:16 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:16 children=1
    └── Text scope=1:1..1:16 literal="Inline $x $ end." children=0
````````````````````````````````

Dollar formula delimiters do not close before digits.

```````````````````````````````` example
Value $300B and ~$100B.
.
Document scope=1:1..1:23 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:23 children=1
    └── Text scope=1:1..1:23 literal="Value $300B and ~$100B." children=0
````````````````````````````````

```````````````````````````````` example
$$x+y$$
.
Document scope=1:1..1:7 children=1
└── FormulaBlock scope=1:1..1:7 mode=standalone literal="x+y" children=0
````````````````````````````````

```````````````````````````````` example
$$
x+y
$$
.
Document scope=1:1..3:2 children=1
└── FormulaBlock scope=1:1..3:2 mode=standalone literal="x+y" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Backslash formula delimiters are not enabled by default.

```````````````````````````````` example
Inline \\(x+y\\) and \(a+b\).
.
Document scope=1:1..1:29 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:29 children=1
    └── Text scope=1:1..1:29 literal="Inline \\(x+y\\) and (a+b)." children=0
````````````````````````````````

```````````````````````````````` example
Display \\[x+y\\] and \[a+b\].
.
Document scope=1:1..1:30 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:30 children=1
    └── Text scope=1:1..1:30 literal="Display \\[x+y\\] and [a+b]." children=0
````````````````````````````````

GitHub's ```formula fenced-code form is a formula block; the fence delimiters and
`formula` info string are not part of the formula body.

```````````````````````````````` example
```formula
x+y
```
.
Document scope=1:1..3:3 children=1
└── FormulaBlock scope=1:1..3:3 mode=standalone literal="x+y" children=0
````````````````````````````````
